---
title: "Ameya Teli"
image: ameya.png
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ameyateli
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ameya.teli@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ameya-teli-020113272/

---

Welcome! My name is Ameya Teli and I am a student at Pomona College graduating in 2027. I am majoring in Math on the statistics track and minoring in Data Science and English.
